notes:
In case of less than 4MB memory 600dpi may not work for all printouts (use 300dpi instead)
In case of duplex option use ljet4d for PCL5e and duplex
PostScript option (use the Kyocera PPD file for PostScript, Instructions)

Maximum paper width: 8.5 inches / 21.6 cm (Standard format printer)

Printing engine speed: 18 pages/min
